layman_headline: Deeply oversold meme coin could bounce from extreme fear levels.
layman_explanation: The TRUMP token has been beaten down so hard that its momentum indicator (RSI at 22) is flashing the most extreme oversold reading of any coin on our watchlist. Historically, when RSI drops this low, a short-term bounce often follows. The broader crypto market is also in 'Fear' territory but slowly improving, which can create conditions for relief rallies in the most punished assets. We're setting a tight stop-loss to protect against further decline since the overall chart structure is still bearish.
layman_action: This is a high-risk, tactical bounce trade with a tight stop-loss. Only commit a small position size you can afford to lose. If it hits $1.42, exit immediately.
expert_reasoning: RSI at 22.3 is the deepest oversold reading across all swing candidates and RSI is our most reliable signal with an 80% win rate and +5.5% average return. The 7-day price action is flat (+1.8%), suggesting selling pressure may be exhausting after a massive -97.9% drawdown from ATH. The chart bias is bearish (-0.70) and price sits below all major MAs, which is why confidence is moderate — this is purely a mean-reversion bounce play, not a trend-following trade. Support at $1.50 provides a nearby floor with resistance at $1.60 as the first hurdle. The improving Fear & Greed trend (25.9 → 29) adds a modest tailwind. Stop-loss at $1.42 (9.6% risk) vs target at $1.78 (13.4% gain) gives roughly 1.4:1 reward-to-risk, acceptable for a high-probability RSI bounce setup.
risk_factors: Bearish chart structure with price below all major moving averages — the downtrend could simply continue
High BTC dominance (56.5%) means capital is flowing away from altcoins and especially meme coins
Political/regulatory headline risk unique to this token could trigger sudden sharp moves in either direction
watch_list: TRUMP holding $1.50 support — a break below invalidates the bounce thesis
Fear & Greed index trajectory — continued improvement toward 35+ would strengthen the case for alt bounces
BTC price action around $65K resistance — a breakout there would lift risk appetite across all alts
market_context: The crypto market is in a 'Fear' state (29/100) but improving, with BTC stable around $64.7K and showing modest weekly gains of 3%. High BTC dominance at 56.5% continues to suppress altcoin performance, making this a selective, risk-managed environment for alt trades.
context_banner: Deeply oversold RSI signals on select alts during an improving fear environment create tactical bounce opportunities with strict risk management.

key_signals.description: TRUMP RSI at 22.3 is deeply oversold — our most reliable signal with 80% win rate and +5.5% avg return historically. This is the strongest oversold reading among all candidates.
Market Fear & Greed at 29 improving from weekly average of 25.9. Improving fear conditions historically precede relief bounces in oversold assets.
Headlines about potential CLARITY Act progress this week and BTC $80K targets suggest improving narrative that could lift risk appetite across crypto.
TRUMP chart bias is bearish (-0.70) with price below all MAs — this is a counter-trend trade requiring strict stop-loss discipline at $1.42.
ETH derivatives reset and retail positioning articles suggest the market is resetting expectations, which often precedes bounce conditions in beaten-down assets.
